allow: PowerShell(Get-PnpDevice -Class "WPD" | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq "OK" } | Select-Object FriendlyName, InstanceId | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); adb version; Write-Host "---"; adb devices)

PowerShell($count = \(Get-ChildItem "E:\\HonorPhoneBackup22MAY2026" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count; $size = \(Get-ChildItem "E:\\HonorPhoneBackup22MAY2026" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB; Write-Host "Files: $count | Size: $\([math]::Round\($size,2\)\) GB")

hooks.command: Set-Location 'E:\SunoMaster\scripts'; git add .; $files = git diff --cached --name-only; if ($files) { $msg = 'auto: ' + (($files | Select-Object -First 3) -join ', '); git commit -m $msg; git push }
